padding-scale.$description: Default density — base spacing そのまま (4 mode の現状値)

gap-scale.$description: Default density — base gap そのまま

min-height-scale.$description: Default density — base target そのまま

padding-scale.$description: Comfortable density — base × 1.25、 広い呼吸 (reading mode / hero / onboarding)

gap-scale.$description: Comfortable density — gap も × 1.25 で element 間に余裕

min-height-scale.$description: Comfortable density — target × 1.1 (tap も focus も少し大きく)

padding-scale.$description: Compact density — base × 0.85、 dense interface (data table / dashboard / dev tool)

min-height-scale.$description: Compact density — target × 0.95 (tap >= 44px は維持、 focus は少し縮)

padding-scale.$description: Cozy density — base × 0.7、 最も dense (terminal mode / log viewer / max info-density)

min-height-scale.$description: Cozy density — target × 0.85 (a11y minimum 24px は超える)
